prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Alzheimer's Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.1 kg; Height 181.4 cm; BMI 21.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 120/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 8.7%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 242mg/dL; current 202mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 72.2kg; 9 months ago 73.1kg; 6 months ago 75.2kg; 3 months ago 75.9kg; current 72.1kg), Height (12 months ago 181.4cm; 9 months ago 181.4cm; 6 months ago 181.4cm; 3 months ago 181.4cm; current 181.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 21.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 121mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 120mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; current 11mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 178mg/g; 9 months ago 191mg/g; 6 months ago 207mg/g; 3 months ago 211mg/g; current 222mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 94mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 120mg/dL; 6 months ago 115mg/dL; 3 months ago 133mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.10 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
